/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/my_service_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/my_service_interfaces/srv/detail/reset_counter__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/omi/my_service_ws/build/my_service_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_service_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
